overview.description: The Alpha Architect 1-3 Month Box ETF (BOXX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed. The fund seeks to provide the price and yield performance of 1-3 month US Treasury Bills, less fees and expenses, through the use of box spreads. BOXX was launched on Dec 28, 2022 and is issued by Alpha Architect.
